titleStmt.title: SII 10.750: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 750. (A.R. No. 187 of 1913.) ON A ROCK NEAR A HILL AT BODAGULO, ON THE BOYRĀṆI-KALLIKŌṬA ROAD, GANJAM DISTRICT. Ś. 1512. (Virōdhi)

summary.p: Seems to record that, while Muhammad Quli Qutb Nizam Pādshāh was ruling, Siṅgabhūpāla of the family of Bāhubalēndra Chandra, who was ruling the Utkala country constructed a tank called Siṅgasāgara to the west of Lāṅgalavēṇi, to the west of Asikā-Lāṅgalavēṇi (road ?)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . śrīmanmahamaṁddu kullikudupā
nijāṁ śrīpādaśā śāsanē . Āndhrētriliṁggamadhyamē kṣititalē
caurāsidurgādhipaḥ . taddō¨rga¨rvadhuraṁdharaḥ pravuḍhaśauryā
saidanvayē . jātaḥ śahasūkaralli mōhaṇaparītō
kramya dhātrītalaṁ . Ataḥ siṁddhutaṭānūpamāḷajāṁggalaparvataṁ .
sarvākrānttaṁ mahīṁ cakrē . Asinā śahabhūpatiḥ . gajapatiharipīṭhā
kramyatē sārvabhaumaḥ . samaravijayadakṣaḥ sāḷvacaṁdrānvayēśaḥ .
sakalaguṇaviśēṣaḥ sarvalōkāśrayēṣaḥ . gajapatinarasiṁhō dēvadi
vyāvatāraḥ . śrīmadbāhubalēṁdracaṁdrakulajō śrīsiṁggabhūpā
lakō . pūjyō rājamahēṁdramukhyadharaṇīkāḷiṁggasaurāṣṭrakāḥ .
sāmrājyōtkalabhūbhujō gajapatēḥ siṁhāsanaṁ pālitaścakrē lāṁggala
vēṇipaścimataṭē sthitvā taṭākōttamē . siṁggasāgaranā mōyaṁ taṭākō
caṁdratārakaṁ . Āsikā lāṁggalavēṇīca . paścimāśātatē sthitaṁ . śālivāha
nabhūpasya vilikhyaṁtē samāḥ . sahasrōrdhvaṁ paṁccaśataṁ tadō¨rdhvaṁ
dvādaśaṁ śarat . virōdhau caitrādipakṣē daśamyāṁ guruvāsarē cakrē laṁgga
lavēṇyāṁcca taṭākaṁ śahabhūpatiḥ .
The rest of the 16th line and the following 11 lines are in Uriya characters.
Digital edition of SII 10.750 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
